$comment: Layer B selection cases for TIER vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The EVALUATE TRUE band selector uses >= boundaries; a candidate that reads the top band as a strict > 1000 gives an order of exactly 1000 the 10% rate (100.00) instead of 15% (150.00), so the 1000 case catches it. Cases cover each band, both band boundaries, a half-cent ROUNDED discount, and a below-threshold order.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 TIER (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-tier)
